title: clitoria glabella
intro: Clitoria glabella, also known as the butterfly pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa and Asia. The medicinal properties of Clitoria glabella include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cognitive function. Clitoria glabella is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide relief from stress and promote overall well-being.
